query: SK Hynix ADR Nasdaq listing SKHY first trading date July 2026 latest news, pricing date, roadshow status, SEC review as of late June 2026. Is July 10 still the expected trading date? Any reports of delay or schedule slippage?
answer:
## Summary

**The SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR listing was NOT delayed — the July 10, 2026 trading date held, and the debut has already happened.** As of today (July 12, 2026), the question is effectively moot.

**Key findings:**
- **No slippage:** The tentative July 10 date signaled in the June 24 filing held firm. No source reported any delay, postponement, or SEC-review-related holdup. The SEC F-1 (CIK 0002120882) went effective in time.
- **Priced July 9 (Thu):** $149.00 per ADR; 177.9 million ADRs; ~$26.5 billion raised — the **largest U.S. share sale ever by a foreign company** (surpassing Alibaba's $25B in 2014), and >7x oversubscribed.
- **Debut July 10 (Fri):** Traded "when-issued" under temporary ticker **SKHYV**; closed at **$168.01, up ~13%** (opened ~$170.43). Implied market cap ~$1.06T. Confirmed by official Nasdaq Trader notice #2026-11.
- **Ticker switch:** Moves to permanent ticker **SKHY** on regular-way basis effective **July 13, 2026**.
- **Only revision was size, not timing:** Final proceeds ($26.5B) came in below the original ~$29B target due to the $149 pricing — but the schedule did not slip.

Cross-validated across CNBC, Yahoo/Reuters/Bloomberg, Nasdaq Trader, KuCoin, and stockanalysis.com. Full structured findings (key facts, sources, data points) submitted.

sources.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
sources.snippet: SK Hynix rose 13% in its first day of trading on Nasdaq, closing at $168.01. Trading under SKHYV, switching to SKHY as of Tuesday.

sources.title: South Korea's biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
sources.snippet: Plans to issue 17.79 million new shares at 45.45 trillion won ($29.65B); expects to start trading July 10 but dates were tentative and subject to change.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq debut: $26.5 billion ADR listing sets record
sources.snippet: Priced at $149 apiece Thursday; 177.9M ADRs; largest US share sale by a foreign company, surpassing Alibaba's $25B (2014).

sources.title: REMINDER: SK hynix Inc. Initial Public Offering on Nasdaq Global Select Market
sources.snippet: SK hynix listed and began trading on Nasdaq Global Select Market July 10, 2026 on a when-issued basis with symbol SKHYV; symbol changes to SKHY on regular-way basis effective July 13, 2026.

sources.title: SK hynix (SKHY) Stock Price & Overview
sources.snippet: IPO Price 149.00; Open 170.43; Day's Range 166.20-177.00; Volume 107,677,441; Market Cap 1.06T.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR Listing: Historical $28B Offering Set to Reshape AI Semiconductor Market on July 10, 2026
sources.snippet: Per regulatory filing published July 6, 2026, SK Hynix set to debut on Nasdaq Global Select Market July 10, 2026.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR offering more than 7 times oversubscribed
sources.snippet: Orders exceeded seven times available shares ahead of Friday's Nasdaq debut (Bloomberg/Reuters).

sources.title: SK Hynix (SKHY) US$26.5bn Nasdaq Listing: Buy or Wait?
sources.snippet: Completed ~US$26.5B Nasdaq listing; began trading Friday July 10, opening ~$170 (+14% vs $149); SKHYV moving to SKHY on July 13; ~57% HBM market share.

sources.title: Memory Giant SK Hynix ADR's First Day of Listing: What Should US Stock Investors Watch?
sources.snippet: July 10 debut raising $26.5B, largest foreign US IPO; trading begins under SKHYV, transitioning to SKHY on July 13.

sources.title: SK Hynix Files for Nasdaq Listing in Up to $29 Billion ADR Offering
sources.snippet: Filed for Nasdaq listing of ADRs targeting up to $29B via 17.79M new ADRs, trading expected July 2026; proceeds for memory-capacity expansion (Yongin fab, advanced packaging).
